task_completion.description: Open the Nx Witness player and view the 'Parking Lot Camera' footage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nx Witness application window is open and displays video footage. The camera name 'Parking Lot Camera' should be visible in the application UI.

task_completion.description: Create or edit the determination report at /home/ga/alarm_review.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano, vim) or terminal window is visible, showing the file path '/home/ga/alarm_review.txt' being edited.

task_completion.description: Include a determination of whether suspicious or criminal activity is present in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text within the report explicitly addresses the presence or absence of suspicious/criminal activity (e.g., stating 'no suspicious activity' or 'no criminal activity').

task_completion.description: Identify the activity that likely triggered the motion alert in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text within the report describes the normal activity seen in the footage that caused the alert (e.g., 'pedestrians walking', 'people moving').

task_completion.description: Provide a recommendation to 'DISMISS' with justification in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text within the report explicitly recommends to 'DISMISS' the alert and provides a justification (e.g., 'because only normal pedestrian motion was observed').

integrity.description: Verify that the Nx Witness application was actually used to view the footage.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Nx Witness GUI open with the video loaded, proving the agent did not bypass the video review step.

integrity.description: Verify that the report was manually constructed by the agent.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the report being edited in a text editor or terminal, rather than instantly appearing from a script execution.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent accurately reported the video contents without hallucinating events.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report correctly identifies the footage as benign and does not invent non-existent criminal activities to justify an escalation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The camera is named 'Parking Lot Camera'. The video contains normal pedestrian motion with no anomalous or criminal events. The expected verdict in the report at '/home/ga/alarm_review.txt' is 'DISMISS' because it is a false alarm.
